nasb.text: Then the men turned away from there and went toward Sodom, while Abraham was still standing before the Lord.

esv.text: So the men turned from there and went toward Sodom, but Abraham still stood before the Lord.

cnv.text: 其中二人從那裡動身，向所多瑪走去，亞伯拉罕卻仍然站在耶和華面前。

ccb.text: 其中二人转身向所多玛走去，亚伯拉罕却仍旧站在耶和华面前。

csbs.text: 其中两人转身离开那里往所多玛去，而亚伯拉罕仍然站在耶和华的面前。
